title: Home Depot Investor Relations
note: Primary source for financial results, strategic priorities, annual reports, quarterly earnings releases, and capital allocation disclosures.

title: Home Depot Official Website
note: Product catalog, service offerings, Pro resources, installation services overview, and store locator—primary reference for product and service scope.

title: Home Depot Market Cap History
note: Historical and current market capitalization data used for market cap estimates and S&P 500 ranking approximation.

title: Home Depot Annual Report FY2024 (10-K)
note: Audited financial statements, business segment data, risk factors, and management discussion for fiscal year ended February 2025, including first full-year SRS Distribution results.

title: Home Depot Completes Acquisition of SRS Distribution
note: Details of the ~$18.25B acquisition of SRS Distribution completed in June 2024, extending Pro specialty trade distribution capabilities in roofing, pool, and landscaping.

title: Ace Hardware Official Website
note: Overview of Ace Hardware's cooperative structure, store network, and product offerings as a decentralized alternative to corporate home improvement retail.

title: Library of Things Official Website
note: Reference for the community tool lending model as an alternative to purchasing infrequently used home improvement tools from retail chains.

title: Fastenal Official Website
note: Overview of Fastenal's branch network, managed inventory programs, and MRO supply capabilities as an alternative to Home Depot Pro for contractor supply.

title: Angi Official Website
note: Overview of Angi's contractor marketplace as a platform-based alternative to Home Depot Installation Services for homeowner-contractor matching.
